description: Default location: ~/.invoker/config.json. For repo-specific configs, set INVOKER_REPO_CONFIG_PATH when launching Invoker.

ssh.comment: SshExecutor uses per-target settings from remoteTargets

staging-server.comment: Managed SSH target configuration for remote execution

build-server-b.comment: Second SSH target for running different tasks on a different host

mixed-local-ssh.comment: Pool routes tasks across mixed SSH/local members with shared queue/drain semantics

pnpm-ssh.comment: Pool for pnpm commands that should run only on SSH machines

executorRoutingRules.comment: Route pnpm commands to the SSH-only pool before defaultPoolId applies

slackHarnessPresets.comment: Slack planning harness presets: preset key -> CLI tool + optional model. Selected via a leading [preset] tag in the lobby @Invoker message. Omit to use built-ins (cursor+claude / cursor+codex / omp / omp+claude / codex).

slackRepos.comment: Slack repo aliases: alias -> git URL, resolved from a [repo:<alias>] tag

prMaintenance.comment: Built-in owner-host PR maintenance workers. Enable on the host that owns the Invoker database; start/stop from Workers or run one scan with ./run.sh --headless worker <kind>.

notes.web_surface: webToken enables the browser UI + Slack live status card surfaces. Env vars INVOKER_WEB_TOKEN / INVOKER_WEB_HOST / INVOKER_WEB_PORT override these. Set webHost to 0.0.0.0 to reach it from another machine (e.g. the DigitalOcean host); open http://<host>:<webPort>/?token=<webToken>.
notes.fetch_behavior: Git fetch failures always abort the task. Fix the underlying network/auth issue and rerun.
